data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve mussel and oyster habitat records
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of mussel and oyster habitat inventory records from the Wadden Sea tidal flats. Supports filtering and pagination through query parameters. Returns a collection of habitat records with their spatial and temporal characteristics. This operation is used to search and retrieve annual inventory data of mussel and oyster banks on exposed tidal areas.
